use_codes.desc: REDUCING THE RISK OF MORTALITY IN HUTCHINSON-GILFORD PROGERIA SYNDROME (HGPS)

indications.text:
ZOKINVY is indicated in patients 12 months of age and older with a body surface area (BSA) of
0.39 m2 and above:
• To reduce the risk of mortality in Hutchinson-Gilford Progeria Syndrome (HGPS)
• For the treatment of processing-deficient Progeroid Laminopathies with either:
Heterozygous LMNA mutatio...
